title: Restore v69 features: user profiles, admin panel, YouTube connection, feedback button, trending, and messaging

requirements.summary: Restore user profile/account functionality with ProfilePage, ProfileSetup modal, UserIdDisplay, UserRoleBadge, and profile hooks
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can navigate to their profile page and see their display name, principal ID, and clip stats
ProfileSetup modal appears on first login for new users
UserRoleBadge and UserIdDisplay are rendered correctly in the profile and sidebar

file_operations.description: Verify ProfilePage renders authenticated user's principal ID, display name, stats (total clips, average score, viral clips count), and chronological clip activity list using useGetCallerUserProfile and useClips hooks. Ensure proper loading states and authentication guards are present.

Verify ProfileSetup modal triggers on first login when userProfile is null, collects display name, and saves via saveCallerUserProfile. Ensure proper isFetched checking to prevent modal flash as described in authorization component usage instructions.

Verify UserIdDisplay renders the authenticated user's short user ID (generated via userIdGenerator utility) and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each. Ensure it uses the identity from useInternetIdentity hook.

Verify UserRoleBadge renders a styled badge for user roles (owner, admin, friend, or default user) with corresponding icons and colors. Ensure it accepts a role prop and displays the appropriate visual styling.
Verify SideNavigation displays UserIdDisplay and UserRoleBadge for authenticated users in the user info section. Ensure these components are visible alongside the user's display name when logged in.

Verify useGetCallerUserProfile hook properly fetches user profile from backend with correct enabled/loading states to prevent ProfileSetup modal flash. Ensure the hook follows the pattern shown in authorization component usage: isLoading should reflect both actorFetching and query.isLoading, and isFetched should check both actor availability and query.isFetched.

Verify ProfilePage route is registered and ProfileSetup modal is conditionally rendered based on authentication state and profile existence. Ensure the modal only shows when isAuthenticated && !profileLoading && isFetched && userProfile === null.

requirements.summary: Restore full AdminPanel with collapsible sections for system controls, analytics, user management, admin messaging, feedback, activity logs, and admin management
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is visible only to users with owner role
All collapsible sections (system controls, analytics, user management, messaging, feedback, activity logs) are present and functional
Admins can send messages to users, manage roles/statuses, delete feedback, and view activity logs

file_operations.description: Verify AdminPanel renders all collapsible sections: SystemControls, AppAnalytics, UserStatusManagement, AdminMessaging, FeedbackSubmissions, ActivityLogTable, AdminManagement/AdminList, and AdminDebugPanel. Ensure the panel is only visible to users with owner role using useIsOwner hook and wrapped in AdminErrorBoundary.

Verify SystemControls provides buttons for pause/resume, restart, and shutdown with confirmation dialogs, managing system status via useSystemStatus hook. Ensure appropriate loading states and success/error toasts.

Verify AppAnalytics displays total clips count, trending count, and a bar chart of upload activity over the last 24 hours using Recharts and useAdminStats hook. Ensure data is formatted correctly for visualization.

Verify UserStatusManagement lists, searches, and manages user roles/statuses with copy-to-clipboard support for principal IDs. Ensure useUserRoles, useSetUserRole, and useSetUserStatus hooks are properly wired.

Verify AdminMessaging form allows admins to enter a recipient user ID and message body, sending messages via useSendAdminMessage hook. Ensure form validation, loading states, and success notifications.

Verify FeedbackSubmissions displays all feedback with type icons, submitter ID, relative timestamps, and delete button per entry using useFeedbackSubmissions and useDeleteFeedback hooks. Ensure loading and empty states.
Verify ActivityLogTable renders searchable activity logs with user ID, action, and relative timestamp using useActivityLogs hook. Ensure search filtering works correctly.
Verify AdminManagement provides form to add new admin by principal ID using useAddAdmin hook and renders AdminList component below it. Ensure validation and error handling.
Verify AdminList fetches and displays admin principals using useAdminList hook, showing short ID and full principal with loading/error states.
Verify AdminDebugPanel displays current principal, admin list, and initialization status with copy and refresh utilities using useAdminDebug hook.
Verify AdminPanel is accessible as a dedicated route or embedded in a page with proper owner-role guard. Ensure navigation to admin features is restricted to owners.

requirements.summary: Restore YouTube channel connection UI in Scheduler page using ChannelConnection component and useYouTubeChannel hook
acceptanceCriteria: ChannelConnection component is visible on the Scheduler page
Connected/disconnected state is shown based on useYouTubeChannel hook
Scheduler page allows selecting a clip and datetime and shows existing scheduled uploads

file_operations.description: Verify ChannelConnection displays YouTube channel connection status (loading, connected, or disconnected) using useYouTubeChannel hook. Ensure proper visual states for each connection status.

Verify Scheduler page renders ChannelConnection component alongside scheduled uploads list and clip scheduling form. Ensure the page uses useScheduledUploads hook for listing/adding/deleting scheduled uploads and displays connection status prominently.

Verify useYouTubeChannel query hook returns YouTube channel connection state. Current stub implementation returns disconnected state; ensure it's properly integrated with the UI and handles loading/error states.

requirements.summary: Restore Report a Bug / Request a Feature button in SideNavigation and BottomNavigation with FeedbackModal
acceptanceCriteria: A feedback button is visible in the sidebar on desktop and in the bottom navigation on mobile
Clicking it opens FeedbackModal with Bug Report and Feature Request options
Submissions are stored and visible in the admin panel's FeedbackSubmissions section

file_operations.description: Verify SideNavigation includes FeedbackModal trigger button visible to all users. Ensure the button is styled consistently with other navigation elements and properly positioned in the sidebar.
Verify BottomNavigation includes FeedbackModal trigger button visible to all users on mobile. Ensure the button is accessible and styled appropriately for mobile viewport.

Verify FeedbackModal allows users to choose between Bug Report and Feature Request types and submit title and description via useFeedbackSubmit hook. Ensure form validation, loading states, and success/error notifications.
Verify useFeedbackSubmit mutation hook stores feedback entries in the feedback store and invalidates feedbackSubmissions query on success. Ensure proper toast notifications for success/error states.

requirements.summary: Restore Trending Now section with TrendingPage, TrendingSidebar, and navigation links
acceptanceCriteria: Trending page is accessible from both desktop sidebar and mobile bottom nav
Top trending clips are displayed in ranked order with viral scores
TrendingSidebar top-5 leaderboard is visible on the trending page

file_operations.description: Verify TrendingPage renders top trending clips sorted by viral/trending score in a responsive grid using useTrendingClips hook. Ensure TrendingSidebar top-5 leaderboard is displayed alongside the clip grid and both components show loading skeletons and empty states appropriately.
Verify TrendingSidebar displays ranked list of up to 5 trending clips with trending scores using useAdminStats hook. Ensure proper styling and loading states.
Verify SideNavigation includes 'Trending' nav link visible to all users (authenticated and anonymous), routing to /trending. Ensure link is styled and positioned correctly in the navigation list.
Verify BottomNavigation includes 'Trending' nav item visible to all users on mobile, routing to /trending. Ensure icon and styling match other nav items.
Verify TrendingPage route is registered at /trending and accessible to all users. Ensure route is not wrapped in authentication guards since trending should be public.

requirements.summary: Restore messaging functionality with MessagesPage, UserMessages component, and navigation links for authenticated users
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can navigate to a Messages page from sidebar and bottom nav
Users can view received messages and send replies
Admin messaging from the admin panel correctly delivers messages visible in the user's message list

file_operations.description: Verify MessagesPage renders UserMessages component for authenticated users and shows login prompt for unauthenticated visitors. Ensure proper authentication guard and layout.

Verify UserMessages displays user's messages list and allows viewing individual messages with reply form using useMyMessages and useSendAdminMessage hooks. Ensure messages are filtered by current user's principal and support both sent/received messages.
Verify SideNavigation includes 'Messages' nav link visible only to authenticated users, routing to /messages. Ensure link is filtered by authentication state.
Verify BottomNavigation includes 'Messages' nav item visible only to authenticated users on mobile, routing to /messages. Ensure proper filtering by authentication state.
Verify useMyMessages query hook fetches messages from in-memory store filtered by user ID as sender or recipient. Ensure query is enabled only when actor and user ID are present.
Verify useSendAdminMessage mutation hook creates and stores AdminMessage locally in message store and invalidates myMessages query cache. Ensure proper message structure and notifications.
Verify MessagesPage route is registered at /messages and wrapped in authentication guard so only logged-in users can access it.

requirements.summary: Restore Social Feed with SocialFeedPage showing recent clip creation activity and navigation links
acceptanceCriteria: Social feed page is accessible from navigation
Feed displays clip activity items with user avatars, thumbnails, and timestamps
Loading skeletons and empty state are shown appropriately

file_operations.description: Verify SocialFeedPage renders recent clip creation activity from all users with avatar initials, clip thumbnails, time ranges, and relative timestamps using useSocialFeed hook. Ensure loading skeletons and empty state are displayed when no activity exists.
Verify SideNavigation includes 'Feed' nav link visible to all users, routing to /feed. Ensure link is styled consistently with other navigation items.
Verify BottomNavigation includes 'Feed' nav item visible to all users on mobile, routing to /feed. Ensure icon and styling are consistent.

Verify useSocialFeed query hook builds feed from local clips store, mapping clips to FeedItem objects sorted by timestamp with 30-second refetch interval. Ensure proper data transformation and sorting.
Verify SocialFeedPage route is registered at /feed and accessible to all users. Ensure route is not wrapped in authentication guards since feed should be public.

requirements.summary: Ensure all navigation links are present and correctly routed in SideNavigation and BottomNavigation, filtered by authentication state
acceptanceCriteria: All main nav links are visible and working on both desktop and mobile
Auth-gated links (Gallery, Profile, Messages) only appear when the user is logged in
All routes resolve to the correct page components without 404 errors

file_operations.description: Verify SideNavigation includes all nav links: Clips, Trending, Feed (public); Gallery, Profile, Messages, Scheduler (authenticated only). Ensure links are filtered by authentication state using useInternetIdentity hook and styled with active states.

Verify BottomNavigation includes all nav items: Clips, Trending, Feed (public); Gallery, Profile, Messages (authenticated only). Ensure items are filtered by authentication state and display appropriate icons for mobile.

Verify all routes are registered and mapped to correct page components: / or /clips (MyClipsPage), /trending (TrendingPage), /feed (SocialFeedPage), /gallery (MyGalleryPage, auth-gated), /profile (ProfilePage, auth-gated), /messages (MessagesPage, auth-gated), /scheduler (Scheduler, auth-gated), /content-manager (ContentManager, admin-only). Ensure auth guards are properly applied.
Verify MyClipsPage renders ClipList component under 'My Clips' heading. Ensure page is accessible via navigation and displays clips correctly.

Verify MyGalleryPage displays grid of minted NFT collectibles for authenticated users, showing thumbnails, time ranges, and viral scores. Ensure authentication guard, loading skeletons, and empty state are present.
